column1: # Strategy: Fibonacci Pullback with Trend Confirmation

column4: Entry method based on Fibonacci retracements
Only take long positions in uptrend
Price must be within 1% of fib level
Stop based on Average True Range
ATR multiplier for stop distance (3x ATR)
ATR multiplier for target distance (6x ATR)
Maximum 60% of account in one trade
Maximum RSI for long entry (avoid overbought)
Minimum RSI for long entry (avoid oversold)
Close if trend reverses on daily
Number of trades in backtest period
Too many trades in choppy conditions
Limit to max 2 trades per day
